review_body_text: overall not bad, training provided, attractive remuneration package but need to work overtime most of the time for my role, quite challenging for my role

The O & T dept employees made me too shame to work together. They took advantage to bully me and asked me to leave the company, other colleagues she treated well. Whenever I had a problem in my works, they asked me to solve it myself. I felt stress and harmful to continue my job, lastly I suggested to leave the organization.

review_title: OCBC is a stable, growth-oriented bank that values people and innovation.
review_body_text: Pros: Supportive Work Environment: Encouraging leadership and helpful colleagues foster a positive workplace culture. Career Development: Offers structured training programs and opportunities for internal mobility. Innovation-Driven: Focus on digital transformation makes it an exciting place for tech-savvy professionals. Customer-Centric Values: Strong emphasis on delivering quality service, which builds purpose in daily work. Work-Life Balance: Reasonable workload and flexible arrangements support personal well-being. Recognition & Ownership: Employees are empowered to lead initiatives and recognized for their contributions. Cons: Pace of Change: Decision-making can sometimes be slower due to the size of the organization. Cross-Functional Collaboration: While encouraged, it may face occasional resistance due to siloed structures. Competitive Progression: Career advancement can be competitive in certain departments.

review_title: High inbound rate and very stressful
review_body_text: As a fresh grad I thought would capable to learn something , but they failed my expectations, too stressful and unable to handle it, very very lousy management
Good experience Various benefits and care on employee. Have 7 days block leave every year to get away from work. Many other benefits for claim as well and

review_title: Best place to have an internship
review_body_text: HR is so helpful, usually remain in the company after internship. Everyone is welcoming and even the ceo are greeting interns in a friendlt manner. Best learning experience.

review_title: A good start for fresh graduate
review_body_text: Colleagues were very helpful. Provide a lot of training to new joiner. Will be more compliance compare to other banks Management keeps chasing the target
Open to feedback, work life balance culture, slow increment and promotion. management is competent. Need to review the benefits structure, transparency of promotion

review_title: Good staff benefit and learning place
review_body_text: Good staff benefit and learning place. Can learn alot of financial knowledge and pitching skill. Other than that, it train your multitasking skill as well
selling sme loan by looking for your own cases are hectic having a good leader to guide you along the way as a freshie would help out a lot nonetheless, good benefits and flexible work schedule
Learning environment , need cope with the stress of hitting sales target, multi-tasking is needed. Good employee benefits. Strategic working location

review_title: Well Work Life Balance, Friendly Colleague
review_body_text: Pros Workload not very heavy Senior Micro-Frontend Developer friendly and willing to teach us. Cons No more work from home, and fixed working hours. Summary Overall quite good
shift hour working, the schedule was tiring coz keep changing, but the salary quite high, so its quite balance. those who looking for experience, this is the place for you
Poor leadership where the leader work too long and has all the power. Creating a bad environment to work. Manual process a lot redundant work causing a lot work

Supportive leadership but OT culture workplace. They have really great benefit. During the training, some trainer are not well train enough for the knowledge delivery that make the learner find it hard to understand.
I was consider unlucky as I was put under TL who is not only bias but rather not easy to talk with or discuss with. The pay was okay and the workload is deemed manageable.
Good location in the city centre , plenty option of food, be prepare to working overtime, working environment (depends on who you working under), public transport accessible

The management was extremely helpful, but it is just the jobscope was all over the place. We have to send emails, we have to answer calls, we have to check on enquiries, we have to solve problems, we have to handle fraud and scam. The benefits is pretty high as much as the responsibility that you have to bear.
Good workplace to grow. The team is really good and boss is really helpful to others. Salary-wise and benefits can be improve. Perks of having a workplace besides lrt
Colleagues are friendly and willing to teach. Good working environment. Company always provide activities for employees to participate. Good location - near lrt station
